what_it_does: A design document (2026-06-11) defining a class of 'total-processing pipelines' meant to resolve the constraint that nobody can know what the system contains and no question-based mechanism can fix that. It states the constraints as axioms, gives the core insight (embeddings + cheap local models make total reads affordable), corrects two framing errors, specifies seven pipelines (P1-P7), and maps each pipeline back to the axiom it resolves.
observations: Written for COLD READERS — other sessions/agents are pointed here to READ and discuss, not to act.
Section 1 lists the constraints as axioms in Tim's own words, including 'the only assumption that can be relied on is that no assumptions can be relied on.'
Establishes that question-based mechanisms are 'structurally disqualified for this class' because you can't ask about what you don't already suspect.
Core insight: 'Questions are selective reads. Embeddings plus cheap local models make TOTAL reads affordable.' Unknown-unknowns are left over as RESIDUE, not answered into existence.

Describes a cost pyramid: vectors (cents) -> resident 4B swarm (32 concurrent roles, max_num_seqs=34, ~2,700 tok/s) -> 88M reranker on CPU -> Claude-class models only for synthesis of already-judged clusters.
Cites the RG10 registry pipeline as proof: 940 raw extractions -> embedding-dedup -> floors -> jury/panel -> 483 verified registry entries, run overnight.
Corrects two errors readers will repeat: 'retrieval-shaped thinking' (assumes an agent knows its task) and 'utterances-as-specs' (Tim's messages are a gradient field, not acceptance criteria).
Introduces 'wrongness is learnable even when rightness is unspecifiable' — a correction corpus trains a rejection-predictor; the twin (model-of-Tim) pre-filters volume.
Defines correctness-without-an-oracle as COHERENCE (consistent, agreed across derivations, expectations met, behaviorally unsurprising, gradient-aligned).
P1 TOTAL EXTRACTION emits a connection-surface registry from every code chunk via a 4B role producing {EXPOSES, EXPECTS, STATE, EVENTS, INPUTS/OUTPUTS}; notes it 'knows its own coverage' as a metric.
P2 FUSION yields a synonym ledger and a CONTRADICTION LEDGER (a conflict = a failed merge).
P3 EXPECTATION JOIN produces broken-assumptions and orphan lists via EXPECTS-vs-EXPOSES embedding join.
P4 THE MERGE solves Tim's FE test case as a join into the same coordinate space, falling out as MATCHED / PRINCIPLE-WITHOUT-SURFACE / SURFACE-WITHOUT-PRINCIPLE lists.
P5 VISUAL JOIN uses Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B to embed mockup regions and screenshots into the same space; measures visual drift.
P6 THE RESIDUE collects everything matching nothing as the unknown-unknowns set.
P7 STAYING TRUE makes the map a commit-triggered standing organ; agents boot from rows not code; the map and work-queue are the same circuit.
Section 5 is an axiom-to-resolution table; section 6 lists four open tests deliberately left unanswered (e.g. 'can coherence-convergence be gamed by consistently-confident nonsense?').
standouts: The central inversion: total processing leaves unknown-unknowns as RESIDUE rather than answering questions about them.
'Wrongness is learnable even when rightness is unspecifiable' plus coherence-as-correctness in the absence of an oracle.
The seven-pipeline architecture (P1-P7) each mapped to a specific axiom it resolves.
Concrete hardware/model grounding (32 concurrent 4B roles, 2,700 tok/s, named embedders) and the RG10 run as empirical proof.
conventions: Follows the vault design-note voice: dated provenance, Tim's words as axioms, companion-file cross-references at the top.
Reuses system vocabulary (registry-filling MAP step, floors arc, drift radar, content-hash refresh, proposal lifecycle, the twin, the gate).
Uses an axiom-to-resolution mapping table and a 'named, deliberately unanswered' open-tests section as living-doc patterns.
Labels pipelines P1-P7 with a one-line italic subtitle stating which problem each directly answers.
notes: The mechanism-class doc arguing that embeddings + a cheap local-model swarm enable TOTAL (questionless) processing of the whole estate, with seven pipelines that emit the inventory, conflicts, broken assumptions, merges, visual drift, and residue.
questions: Have any of P1-P7 been built beyond the cited RG10 precedent, or are they all still design?
What is the actual prioritization rule chosen for ordering 10,000 findings (open test 2)?
Which embedder loadout policy was settled for standing-map vs deep-space re-indexing (open test 4)?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it states it is the full statement of a mechanism class for cold readers to read and discuss, and delivers exactly that: axioms, core insight, corrected framings, seven specified pipelines, and an axiom-resolution map, while explicitly leaving tests open.
apparent_themes: Cost-tiered intelligence (spend the scarce model only on synthesis)
Coherence/convergence as correctness without a spec or oracle
Learning wrongness from a correction corpus + the twin
The map as a standing self-updating organ identical to the work queue
intention_signals: Trying to give the Company a mechanical, non-question-based way to know itself and to merge unknown work into an unknown estate — converting 'nobody can know' into measured coverage, ledgers, and joins, so building can proceed off the substrate rather than off any mind.
novelty: The reframing of unknown-unknowns as the residue of total processing, and of conflicts as 'failed merges' detected by deduplication itself — plus correctness defined as coherence-by-convergence across context-less parallel sessions.
contribution: Contributes the total-processing axioms, the cost-pyramid argument, the two corrected framings (gradient-field, coherence-as-correctness), and a concrete seven-pipeline specification (extraction, fusion, expectation join, merge, visual join, residue, freshness) each tied to the constraint it dissolves.
summary_for_embedding: A design document specifying seven 'total-processing' pipelines that use embeddings and a cheap local-model swarm to read the entire code/design estate unconditionally, emitting an inventory, contradiction ledger, broken-assumption/orphan lists, merge plans, visual drift, and an unknown-unknowns residue, with coherence as the correctness standard.
intention_for_embedding: To resolve the constraint that nobody can enumerate or verify the system by replacing question-based mechanisms with total reads that emit findings mechanically and stay fresh as a standing organ.
